summary: Tested iteration 87: Production Studio Casting Agency hired status display and Acting School casting students bugs. All backend APIs work correctly. Frontend correctly shows hired recruits with greyed-out style and badges. The 'Tutti gli slot occupati' message is correctly contextual to training slots, not casting students section.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All reported bugs verified as fixed

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user fandrex1@gmail.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: The casting agency system in Production Studio now properly tracks which recruits were hired (via casting_hires collection). Backend returns 'hired' boolean and 'hire_action' (hire|school) per recruit. Frontend shows hired recruits greyed out with opacity-50 class and badges ('Nel cast' or 'A scuola'). Clicking hired recruit does NOT open hire dialog. Acting School casting students section shows correct capacity count (2 + school_level).

Backend Tests (pytest).test_casting_endpoint_returns_recruits: PASSED - Returns weekly recruits with discount info
Backend Tests (pytest).test_hired_recruits_info: PASSED - 4/4 recruits hired this week (2 hire, 2 school)
Backend Tests (pytest).test_school_status_endpoint: PASSED - Returns has_school, max_slots, training info

Frontend Tests (Playwright).production_studio_casting_panel: PASSED - Opens with 4 recruits, all greyed out
Frontend Tests (Playwright).hired_badges_display: PASSED - Shows 'Nel cast' (2) and 'A scuola' (2) badges
Frontend Tests (Playwright).hired_recruits_greyed: PASSED - All 4 recruits have opacity-50 class
Frontend Tests (Playwright).click_hired_no_dialog: PASSED - Clicking hired recruit does NOT open hire dialog
Frontend Tests (Playwright).tutti_ingaggiati_message: PASSED - Shows 'Tutti ingaggiati! Nuovi talenti la prossima settimana.'
Frontend Tests (Playwright).casting_student_display: PASSED - Shows Arjun Reddy with skills and 24h elapsed

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Production Studio > Agenzia Casting - clicking actor does nothing
bugs_verified_fixed.details: Backend now returns 'hired' field per recruit. Frontend greys out hired recruits and disables click handler.

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Acting School shows '0/6 posti' and 'Tutti gli slot occupati' with no students
bugs_verified_fixed.details: Backend returns correct capacity (2 + school_level). Frontend shows actual used/capacity. The 'Tutti gli slot' message only appears for TRAINING slots (not casting students) when training_count >= max_slots.

backend_changes.GET /api/production-studio/casting: Now queries casting_hires collection to check which recruits were hired this week. Returns 'hired' boolean and 'hire_action' string per recruit.
backend_changes.POST /api/production-studio/casting/hire: Rejects already-hired recruits with 400 status and 'Hai già ingaggiato questo talento questa settimana' message.

frontend_changes.ProductionStudioPanel.jsx lines 333-385: Recruit cards now check r.hired - if true, shows greyed style with badge. onClick handler only fires when !r.hired.
